config.expression: if({view.custom.state.selected.status} = "Published", "badge badge-published", if({view.custom.state.selected.status} = "Draft", "badge badge-warn", if({view.custom.state.selected.status} = "Deprecated", "badge badge-muted", "")))

props.text: This version is read-only. Click + New Version to create an editable draft copy with a new effective date.
No versions yet for this spec. Click + New Version to create the first draft.
Select a quality spec from the list, or click + New Spec.

customMethods.name: initIncoming
_emptyHeader
_emptyVersion
_clone
customMethods.script: return system.util.jsonDecode(system.util.jsonEncode(obj))

customMethods.name: loadSpec
loadActiveVersion
refreshVersions
customMethods.script:
specId = self.view.custom.selectedSpecId
	if not specId:
		self.view.custom.versions = []
		return
	self.view.custom.versions = BlueRidge.Quality.QualitySpec.listVersions(specId, True)

customMethods.name: refreshSpecs
customMethods.script: self.view.custom.specs = BlueRidge.Quality.QualitySpec.getAllForList(self.view.custom.filter)

customMethods.name: handleNewSpec
customMethods.script:
res = BlueRidge.Quality.QualitySpec.createSpec({"name": "New Quality Spec", "itemId": None, "operationTemplateId": None, "description": ""})
	BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult(res, "Quality spec created")
	if res and res.get("Status"):
		self.refreshSpecs()
		newId = res.get("NewId")
		if newId:
			self.view.custom.selectedSpecId = newId

customMethods.name: handleSaveHeader
handleNewVersion
customMethods.script:
specId = self.view.custom.selectedSpecId
	if not specId:
		return
	res = BlueRidge.Quality.QualitySpec.createNewVersion(specId)
	BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult(res, "New draft version created")
	if not (res and res.get("Status")):
		return
	newId = res.get("NewId")
	self.refreshVersions()
	self.refreshSpecs()
	if newId:
		self.view.custom.activeVersionId = newId

customMethods.name: handleSaveDraft
customMethods.script:
draft = self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {}
	vid = draft.get("id")
	if not vid:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("No draft selected", "No draft version is active.", "warning")
		return
	eff = draft.get("effectiveFromDisplay") or ""
	eff = eff.strip() if isinstance(eff, basestring) else eff
	if not eff:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("Effective From required", "Enter an effective date before saving.", "warning")
		return
	attrs = draft.get("attributes") or []
	res = BlueRidge.Quality.QualitySpec.saveDraft(vid, eff, attrs)
	BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult(res, "Draft saved")
	if res and res.get("Status"):
		self.refreshVersions()
		self.loadActiveVersion()

customMethods.name: handlePublish
customMethods.script:
draft = self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {}
	vid = draft.get("id")
	if not vid:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("No draft selected", "No draft version is active.", "warning")
		return
	eff = draft.get("effectiveFromDisplay") or ""
	eff = eff.strip() if isinstance(eff, basestring) else eff
	if not eff:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("Effective From required", "Enter an effective date before publishing.", "warning")
		return
	attrs = draft.get("attributes") or []
	if not attrs:
		BlueRidge.Common.Notify.toast("At least one attribute required", "Add at least one attribute before publishing.", "warning")
		return
	res = BlueRidge.Quality.QualitySpec.publish(vid, eff, attrs)
	BlueRidge.Common.Ui.notifyResult(res, "Version published")
	if res and res.get("Status"):
		self.refreshVersions()
		self.loadActiveVersion()
		self.refreshSpecs()

customMethods.name: openDeprecateSpecConfirm
customMethods.script:
sel = self.view.custom.specHeader.selected or {}
	if not sel.get("id"):
		return
	system.perspective.openPopup(
		id="mpp-confirm-destructive",
		view="BlueRidge/Components/Popups/ConfirmDestructive",
		modal=True,
		showCloseIcon=False,
		params={
			"title": "Deprecate Quality Spec",
			"message": "Deprecate this entire spec and all its versions? It will no longer be selectable for inspections.",
			"confirmLabel": "Deprecate",
			"cancelLabel": "Cancel",
			"confirmClass": "btn btn-danger btn-sm",
			"replyMessage": "qsConfirmDeprecateSpecResult",
		},
	)

customMethods.name: openDiscardDraftConfirm
customMethods.script:
draft = self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {}
	if not draft.get("id"):
		return
	system.perspective.openPopup(
		id="mpp-confirm-destructive",
		view="BlueRidge/Components/Popups/ConfirmDestructive",
		modal=True,
		showCloseIcon=False,
		params={
			"title": "Discard Draft",
			"message": "Discard this draft version and all unsaved edits? This cannot be undone.",
			"confirmLabel": "Discard",
			"cancelLabel": "Cancel",
			"confirmClass": "btn btn-danger btn-sm",
			"replyMessage": "qsConfirmDiscardResult",
		},
	)

customMethods.name: openDeprecateVersionConfirm
customMethods.script:
sel = self.view.custom.state.selected or {}
	if not sel.get("id"):
		return
	ver = sel.get("versionNumber")
	system.perspective.openPopup(
		id="mpp-confirm-destructive",
		view="BlueRidge/Components/Popups/ConfirmDestructive",
		modal=True,
		showCloseIcon=False,
		params={
			"title": "Deprecate Version",
			"message": "Deprecate v" + str(ver) + "? This retires the version from production use.",
			"confirmLabel": "Deprecate",
			"cancelLabel": "Cancel",
			"confirmClass": "btn btn-danger btn-sm",
			"replyMessage": "qsConfirmDeprecateVersionResult",
		},
	)

customMethods.name: openUnsavedConfirm
_addAttribute
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {})
	attrs = list(draft.get("attributes") or [])
	attrs.append(BlueRidge.Quality.QualitySpec.emptyAttribute())
	draft["attributes"] = attrs
	self.view.custom.state.editDraft = draft

customMethods.name: _swapAttrs
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {})
	attrs = list(draft.get("attributes") or [])
	if idxA < 0 or idxB < 0 or idxA >= len(attrs) or idxB >= len(attrs):
		return
	attrs[idxA], attrs[idxB] = attrs[idxB], attrs[idxA]
	draft["attributes"] = attrs
	self.view.custom.state.editDraft = draft

customMethods.name: _removeAttr
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {})
	attrs = list(draft.get("attributes") or [])
	if idx < 0 or idx >= len(attrs):
		return
	del attrs[idx]
	draft["attributes"] = attrs
	self.view.custom.state.editDraft = draft

customMethods.name: _applyAttrField
customMethods.script:
draft = dict(self.view.custom.state.editDraft or {})
	attrs = list(draft.get("attributes") or [])
	if idx < 0 or idx >= len(attrs):
		return
	row = dict(attrs[idx])
	row[field] = value
	if field == "uomId":
		uoms = self.view.custom.uoms or []
		code = ""
		for u in uoms:
			if u.get("Id") == value:
				code = u.get("Code") or ""
				break
		row["uomCode"] = code
	attrs[idx] = row
	draft["attributes"] = attrs
	self.view.custom.state.editDraft = draft

customMethods.name: handleAddAttribute
customMethods.script: self._addAttribute()

messageHandlers.script:
if not payload:
		return
	self.view.custom.specs = BlueRidge.Quality.QualitySpec.getAllForList(self.view.custom.filter)
	self.view.custom.selectedSpecId = payload.get("specId")

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._swapAttrs(idx, idx - 1)

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._swapAttrs(idx, idx + 1)

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._removeAttr(idx)

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyAttrField(idx, "attributeName", payload.get("value"))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyAttrField(idx, "dataType", payload.get("value"))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyAttrField(idx, "uomId", payload.get("value"))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyAttrField(idx, "targetValue", payload.get("value"))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyAttrField(idx, "lowerLimit", payload.get("value"))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyAttrField(idx, "upperLimit", payload.get("value"))

if not payload:
		return
	idx = int(payload.get("rowIndex", -1))
	self._applyAttrField(idx, "isRequired", bool(payload.get("value")))
